description: Style Note Stripes that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish t-shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The ribbed hemline ensures that it stays snug on your waist, offering a stylishly casual Fit. Pair it with denims and sports shoes for a casual look. Product Details   Navy blue and white striped shirt has a tipped collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, chest buttoned placket, embroidered branding on the left chest and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Pre-soak the garment before wash Preferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing, or flat dry Preferably steam iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size XL
